name: EMPTY SELLA SYNDROME
definition: extension of subarachnoid space into sella turcica, which becomes exposed to CSF pulsations postsurgical after disruption of diaphragma sellae
discriminating_features: slowly progressive symmetrical / asymmetrical (double floor) enlargement of sella
small rim of pituitary tissue displaced posteriorly + inferiorly
"infundibulum" sign = infundibulum extends to floor of sella

general: slowly progressive symmetrical / asymmetrical (double floor) enlargement of sella
small rim of pituitary tissue displaced posteriorly + inferiorly
"infundibulum" sign = infundibulum extends to floor of sella
